list.empty: No webhooks yet. Click the button above to create your first one.

create.title: Create Webhook
create.urlDesc: A POST request will be sent to this URL when task events occur.
create.eventsDesc: Select the event types you want to receive notifications for.
create.secretPlaceholder: Secret key to verify request origin
create.secretDesc: When set, each request will include an X-AgentSys-Signature header for verification.

delete.confirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this webhook? This action cannot be undone.

test.title: Send Test Request
test.desc: A mock event payload will be sent to the webhook URL.
test.errorMsg: Test request failed. Please check if the URL is correct.
